Typed and plain handlers mix on one struct: shared group prefix, shared
middleware names, one conflict table; View responses render through the
declared template set.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26

require (
	github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/templates v0.0.0
	github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/web v0.0.0
)

replace (
	github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/templates => TEMPLATEDIR
	github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/web => WEBDIR
)
-- main.go --
package main

func main() {
	if err := run(); err != nil {
		panic(err)
	}
}
-- shared/mw.go --
package shared

import "net/http"

//fabrik:http:middleware name=auth
func RequireAuth(next http.Handler) http.Handler { return next }
-- web/templates.go --
package web

import "embed"

//fabrik:templates
//go:embed all:templates
var Templates embed.FS
-- web/templates/_default/_layout.html --
<html>{{ block "content" . }}{{ end }}</html>
-- web/templates/_default/home.html --
{{ define "content" }}{{ .Title }}{{ end }}
-- web/web.go --
package web

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/web"
)

type HomePage struct {
	Title string
}

func (HomePage) Template() string { return "home" }

//fabrik:http:group /app middleware=auth
type Handlers struct{}

//fabrik:web GET /home
func (h *Handlers) Home(req *web.Request) (web.Response, error) {
	return web.View(HomePage{Title: "hi"}), nil
}

//fabrik:web POST /save
func (h *Handlers) Save(req *web.Request) (web.Response, error) {
	return web.Redirect("/app/home"), nil
}

//fabrik:http GET /raw
func (h *Handlers) Raw(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}
-- want/main.gen.go --
// Code generated by fabrik. DO NOT EDIT.
// Regenerate with: fabrik wire

package main

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"

	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/router"
	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/templates"
	web2 "github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/web"

	"app/shared"
	"app/web"
)

func run() error {
	// Providers
	webTemplates, err := templates.Load(web.Templates, "templates")
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}
	adapter := web2.NewAdapter(web2.WithRenderer(webTemplates))

	r := router.New()
	webHandlers := &web.Handlers{}

	// Register
	r.Method("GET", "/app/home", adapter.Wrap(webHandlers.Home), shared.RequireAuth)
	r.Method("POST", "/app/save", adapter.Wrap(webHandlers.Save), shared.RequireAuth)
	r.Method("GET", "/app/raw", webHandlers.Raw, shared.RequireAuth)

	// Serve
	addr := ":8080"
	if p := os.Getenv("PORT"); p != "" {
		addr = ":" + p
	}
	return http.ListenAndServe(addr, r)
}
